name: Command Module Odyssey — Instrument Panel
description: Powered down to its minimum survival state, Odyssey is cold and dark — a dead ship waiting to be resurrected. The instrument panel is covered in condensation that catches the faint light from the LM tunnel.
atmosphericDetails: Every surface is wet; condensation runs down the instrument panel in thin rivulets and pools at the base of the circuit breaker rows
The cabin smells of cold metal and the faint chemical tang of the fuel cells that are no longer running
In the dark, the only light comes through the tunnel connecting Odyssey to Aquarius — a dim, warm rectangle that makes the CM feel like a cave
Swigert's handwritten cue card — the improvised power-up sequence — is taped to the center console with medical tape from the first aid kit
The heat shield is on the other side of the hull, six inches away, and it is the only thing standing between the crew and 5,000-degree plasma
